main_flow.text: User enters the email id 2. System checks whether the email id already exists. If YES, then proceed to Exception flow E1 If NO, then proceed to next step. 3. System displays a form to set password

User enters the relevant details and chooses to save 5. System displays a message: an email with an activation link has been sent to the registered email id, please follow the instructions to complete the registration process.

User validates the email ID 7. System validates the email id If valid, proceed to next step If not, proceed to alternate flow A1 8. System displays a message to resend a new link to continue If user chooses to continue, proceed to step 3 Else proceed to Exception flow E2

use_cases.title: Edit User

main_flow.text: User selects the appropriate action 2. System displays the list of appropriate users
User selects the relevant actor 4. System displays the editable details of the actor
User modifies the relevant details and chose to save 6. Displays “A user details has been modified “ * Exception or Alternate Flow

business_rules: Details of the individual users cannot be modified by CJ Admin
Details of the Corporate users cannot be modified by CJ Admin
CJ admin can only modify the details of the user who has already been added in the system.

use_cases.title: Delete user

main_flow.text: User selects appropriate action. 2. System displays the list of appropriate users.

User selects the relevant users. 4. System displays a message to confirm the action If actor chooses to continue, proceed to next step 5. System displays “A user has been deleted” * Exception or Alternate Flow

business_rules: CJ Admin cannot delete individual users.
CJ Admin cannot delete corporate individual users.

Once a role is created with appropriate privileges, those privileges should not be modified in the future.

main_flow.text: User selects the relevant function. 2. System displays a list of assessment options.
User chooses an assessment 4. System redirects to the selected assessment page. If the assessment is a paid one, proceed to Alternate flow A1 Else, proceed to next step.
User attempts the assessment and selects the relevant 6. System navigates to the relevant page and usecase function. terminates * Exception A1: Make Payment and continue to step 5 or Alternate Flow

User edits the score and chooses to save 4. System displays a message: “Criterion has been edited” * Exception or Alternate Flow

business_rules: Career id should be unique.
The user should be able to to change the career title in the future (If needed) and keep all other details unchanged. (As requested by the client)

use_cases.title: Define Contrast Variable

main_flow.text: User selects CIA Variable 2. System calculates the difference value (100 minus Variable score) (E.g. If candidate's score on Extrovert- Introvert Variable is 85, then system calculates 100 - 85 = 15) 3. System defines the original variable value as Contrast Variable1 (CV1) and the difference value as Contrast Variable2 (CV2
User assigns Name for CV1 (Extrovert) and CV2 8. System displays the message: variable and contrast (Introvert), defines bands for CV1(normal band definition variable has been defined. process).
User adds text corresponding to each band.
User defines bands for CV2
User adds band-specific text. * Exception or Alternate Flow Actor actions System response
